query:
INSERT INTO postal_code_ranges (regionId, startCode, endCode, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, '1000', '1299', NOW(), NOW()
FROM regions 
WHERE name = 'Bruxelles-Capitale' AND countryId = (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'BE');
